case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS HEISER, WILLIAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-20-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENTS. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D EVERY 6 MONTHS UNTIL PAID IN FULL AT WHICH TIME THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-20-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-09-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CON'T FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/PAYMENT CASE CON'T FOR 6 MONTHS. IF ANY PAYMENTS ARE MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BE- COMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-08-2004, OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-01-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-11-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-11-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-22-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEISER, WILLIAM NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-09-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-10-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 NO APPEARANCES. CASE CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF ANY PAYMENTS ARE MISSED, ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-10-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-01-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 11/1/06 8:30 A.M. FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HEISER, WILLIAM

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-17-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON DEFENDANT'S ABILITY TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS. DEFENDANT DIRECTED TO EXPLORE GETTING A JOB.
IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,448.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT HEISER, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-17-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT WILL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $20.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON SEPT. 17, 2004. CONTINAUNCE IS FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS.
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $50 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON DEC 2004 & ON OR BEFORE THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN
